name: Ex-Soldier
description: You served in the last remnants of organized military before it collapsed. Disciplined, dangerous, and haunted by orders you followed.
flavor: "The war ended. Nobody told the bullets."
passiveDescription: Combat Training: +10% damage with ranged weapons.

name: Scavenger
description: You've survived by taking what others left behind. Quick fingers, sharp eyes, and an instinct for danger that's kept you alive when others weren't.
flavor: "One person's trash is another's life expectancy."
passiveDescription: Scavenger's Eye: +20% item drop chance from enemies.

name: Wasteland Medic
description: You patched people up when there was nothing to patch them with. Part surgeon, part chemist, all stubborn. People live because you refused to let them die.
flavor: "I've performed surgery with a knife and a prayer. You'll be fine."
passiveDescription: Triage: Healing abilities restore 25% more HP.

name: Reformed Raider
description: You were the thing that made people lock their doors. Something changed — maybe someone showed you mercy you didn't deserve, maybe you just got tired of the blood. Now you use those skills differently.
flavor: "I know every trick because I invented half of them."
passiveDescription: Ruthless: Critical hits deal 2× damage instead of 1.75×.

name: Tech Salvager
description: You understand machines in a way most people understand breathing. Pre-war tech, jury-rigged weapons, malfunctioning robots — you speak their language.
passiveDescription: Tech Genius: Energy/tech abilities cost 2 less Energy.

name: Wasteland Mutant
description: The radiation didn't kill you. It changed you. Your body is something new — tougher, stranger, not entirely human. People fear what they don't understand. You've learned to use that.
flavor: "Normal died with the old world. I'm what came next."
passiveDescription: Irradiated Hide: +4 natural armor. Immune to poison.
